Footer.heading: Got a hypothesis?
Footer.description: Let's grab a coffee, sketch the architecture, and build your next MVP. Our testing machine never shuts down.

Hero.subtitle: Café Labs is a multi-sector ecosystem where ideas become code, design, and product. We build agile MVPs to validate ideas before the coffee gets cold.

Manifesto.paragraph1: The traditional business model is slow and expensive. Café Labs works like a private incubator: a safe environment for failure, designed for fast wins.
Manifesto.paragraph2: We don't write 50-page business plans. We build code, designs, and physical prototypes. We mix the welcoming energy of coffee with a lab's technical rigor to find out what actually has market value.
Manifesto.pilar1Desc: We turn hypotheses into minimum viable versions with the lowest possible cost and time. No excess, just the core of the product.
Manifesto.pilar2Desc: We launch to the real market. We collect usage metrics, conversion rates, and genuine feedback from real users, not just assumptions.
Manifesto.pilar3Desc: We analyze the results. If it fails, we kill the idea fast and move to the next one. If it validates, we scale the infrastructure and the business.

BentoGrid.heading: The Lab.
BentoGrid.description: Our portfolio isn't a client showcase, it's a record of tested hypotheses. See what we're running behind the scenes.
BentoGrid.domoDescription: Household management app for families and groups: shared pantry, shopping list, and home organization by member.
BentoGrid.dindinDescription: Personal finance control via 'envelopes': income comes in, gets allocated across categories, and expenses come out of each one.
BentoGrid.forgeDescription: Gallery of Forge's specialized agents (orchestrator + team), with the full prompt and live search of the public repository.
BentoGrid.mindDescription: Generic personal knowledge base, versioned and integrated with Claude Code — clone it and build your own project 'mind'.

Setores.heading: Our Infrastructure.
Setores.description: A complete ecosystem. We develop, test, and scale solutions covering the four crucial fronts of today's market.
